personalInfo.summary: Full-stack developer with a focus on React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Built production-ready checkout flows with 15% lower dropout rates, 12+ REST APIs with 99.9% uptime, and 40% fewer production errors. Experience from Novo Nordisk and BS Technologies with measurable results across frontend, backend, and UX.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
bullets: Improved React/Next.js checkout flows, reducing dropout rates by 15%.
Built 12+ Spring Boot REST endpoints with 99.9% uptime.
Reduced production errors by 40% through extensive testing and quality assurance.

experience.title: Student Assistant, UX/UI & Digitalization
bullets: Conducted user interviews with 25+ laboratory technicians.
Built 5 interactive Power BI dashboards, reducing reporting time by 30%.
Designed Figma wireframes, saving 10+ hours weekly per team.
Achieved 90% user satisfaction in usability tests.
Facilitated design workshops with cross-disciplinary teams.

experience.title: Data Assistant
bullets: Created automation that reduced manual data entry by 60%.

details: Courses: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (02285), Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (02180), Financial Management, Software Processing, Database Management
Focus: Software development, data analysis, digitalization, and strategic economic management
Bachelor project: ResizeHub (image processing service) — grade 12

projects.name: ResizeHub — On-Demand Image Rescaling Service
projects.description: Scalable cloud-based backend for on-demand image processing. Designed REST APIs with JWT authentication, high-performance server-side rescaling, cloud storage, CDN delivery, and CI/CD pipelines with automated testing. Received grade 12 (A) at DTU.

projects.name: Frisør Glostrup — Salon Booking System
projects.description: Full-stack booking system with real-time availability and Neon cloud database. Zod validation, modular component architecture, deployed on Netlify.

projects.name: RoboRally Game Server
projects.description: RESTful multiplayer game server with HAL controllers in Java/Spring Boot. 100% automated test coverage (96/96 tests).

projects.name: CDO AI Robot Project
projects.description: AI-based robot with EV3 and MicroPython for navigation in complex environments.

projects.name: Aviuz Chat Project
projects.description: Intelligent chatbot focusing on user experience and AI integration.

projects.name: Supply Chain Management Project
projects.description: Analysis and optimization of supply chains in the automotive industry.
